gist.headline: Syncing the scrolls

gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing a tiny scroll or book, representing documentation updates. Nomnom creature eating an old page.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing a glowing digital scroll while the round tan nomnom creature happily eats a single old piece of paper.
